response.justification: Strong software engineer with excellent fundamentals and architectural thinking, but a fundamental domain and technical mismatch. Last significant C++ role was 10+ years ago (2014-2015); current expertise is web/cloud TypeScript and Node.js. No industrial automation, IoT, manufacturing systems, or industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443) experience. Educational background is CS and photography/design, not the required B.E./B.Tech engineering degree.
strengths: Deep software craftsmanship: proven TDD, clean architecture, CI/CD, and mentoring capability across multiple roles
Systems-level thinking demonstrated through async I/O, caching, performance optimization, and distributed systems work
Cloud and infrastructure expertise with AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, and modern DevOps practices
concerns: C++ experience is stale (2014-2015 National Instruments role, 6 months); current 10+ years focused on web tech (TypeScript, Node.js, React)
No industrial automation, manufacturing, IoT, or industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443, SDL) background; all roles are web, fintech, media, or GIS platforms
Educational credentials mismatch: BS in generic Computer Science and BA in Photography/Design, not the required B.E./B.Tech engineering degree

key_factors.factor: Software engineering fundamentals and mentoring strength
